Hi, I'm Ritesh Chakramani 👋 A passionate **Full-Stack Developer** specialized in **React.js & Python**.

About Me

I love building web applications that solve real-world problems. With expertise in **React.js, Python, Flask, and Machine Learning**, I enjoy working on both front-end and back-end technologies.

Projects

  • 📊 Social Media Dashboard – Manage and schedule social media posts.
  • 🤖 AI Chatbot – A smart chatbot using NLP with spaCy.
  • 🔍 Resume Scanner – An AI-based resume ranking system.
  • 🖼 Face Recognition Attendance – A system to mark attendance using face recognition.
